title: maven next-available version finder
description: List the versions Maven Central's maven-metadata.xml advertises for a group:artifact coordinate, rank candidates above the current version by dotted ordering, and resolve-test them via mvn dependency:get (resolves from the repository without a full build) to find the next version that actually resolves.
safety: dependency:get resolves into the local repository cache only — never the target repo tree; mock runs are synthetic — zero network, zero subprocess
